description: Led the development of Krushee Sanskrutee using Flutter and Firebase, enhancing performance by 60% and user satisfaction by 30%. Built and deployed a scalable Android app on the Google Play Store, enabling 100+ farmers to buy and sell goods and services seamlessly.

Engineered a Lead Enrichment Framework optimizing marketing and sales strategies by enriching product data, enabling 20% faster client targeting. Built a high-performance web application using Java, Spring Boot, Vanilla JS, improving system performance by 40% and reducing load times by 30%. Earned 4 awards in 2 years for developing and implementing solutions that optimized workflows and for improving team efficiency by 50%. Designed and implemented enterprise-grade RESTful APIs, ensuring data protection and accelerating data throughput by 45%, supporting frictionless front-end integration.
